final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for the brand "RAN QIU" with an autumnal, poetic, and tranquil visual experience.

Style/medium: minimalist poster, Eastern aesthetics, natural poetry, warm healing atmosphere, generous negative space, shallow depth of field
Composition: ample white space, soft bokeh
Subject: brand mark "RAN QIU" combined with natural autumnal elements
Scene/backdrop: warm autumn ambiance
Lighting/mood: golden hour, warm tones, gentle and serene
Color palette: #8B3A1E (deep autumn brown-red), #E8DCCB (beige), #D4A574 (golden brown)
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): "RAN QIU"
Constraints: 
Avoid:
